summary: Tested CalcInput (QuickBooks-style inline calculator) wiring across ExpensesPage, PaymentsPage, UnifiedSalesPage, TerminalSales, FundTransferDialog, StockInjectionDialog. Core CalcInput component behaviour is WORKING correctly where wired (verified live with Playwright on expenses-expense-amount and expenses-cashout-amount: operator key pops bubble with data-calc-active=1, running total previews correctly, Enter commits, Escape reverts, double-operator is merged, non-numeric keys are blocked). Found 2 confirmed Phase-1 wiring misses where a plain <Input type="number"> was left in place instead of <CalcInput>.

ui_bugs.issue: Amount field is still a plain <Input type="number"> — CalcInput NOT wired. Operator key does not open calc tape. data-calc-active attribute absent. Confirmed by source inspection (/app/frontend/src/pages/ExpensesPage.js line 880-881) and live Playwright test (a0=None, a1=None, tape not shown, typing '200+50' was silently truncated to '050').

Split Digital amount field uses plain <Input type="number"> instead of CalcInput. Confirmed at /app/frontend/src/pages/UnifiedSalesPage.js line 3709. split-cash at line 3703 is correctly a CalcInput, but its sibling split-digital is not. Inconsistent UX (cash supports calc, digital does not).

verified_working: expenses-expense-amount: PASS (1500+250=1750, 20*3=60, escape reverts to 5, double-op '5++3' handled, letters blocked — visual confirmation in screenshot tape bubble '5+3 = 8')

expenses-cashout-amount: PASS (200+50=250, full tape text '200+50
=
250
↵ commit · Esc cancel')
CalcInput component rendering: data-testid={testId}-tape bubble appears on operator keypress, data-calc-active flips 0↔1 correctly, offline-safe (no eval used)
not_tested_reasons: PaymentsPage receive-amount: element present and wired as CalcInput, but disabled={!selectedCustomer} blocked direct test. Could not auto-locate customer selector (tried multiple placeholder patterns). Wiring itself is correct in source.

FundTransferDialog fund-transfer-amount: could not auto-locate the button that opens the dialog on /accounts, /funds, /wallet, /dashboard routes. Source at /app/frontend/src/components/FundTransferDialog.js line 138 confirms it uses CalcInput.
StockInjectionDialog injection-qty: confirmed via source (line 203) uses CalcInput; dialog entry point not auto-located. Source wiring correct.

TerminalSales (POS) live POS testing: /terminal route shows pairing screen requiring manager-pairing flow; cannot test pairing + offline from Playwright in 1 run. Source inspection confirms 6 CalcInput usages correctly wired (scan-qty-input, discount-input, amount-tendered-input, split-cash-input, split-digital-input, and one more). Note: TerminalSales testids end with -input suffix, not matching the names in the review doc, but source is wired correctly.

UnifiedSalesPage cart/line/freight/overall-discount/amount-tendered/partial calc wiring: confirmed via grep (11 CalcInput occurrences) but live flow testing for each requires adding line items which is several steps — not run.
action_items: Fix ExpensesPage Farm Expense amount (line 880-881) — replace <Input type="number"> with <CalcInput>. onChange signature will change from e=>parseFloat(e.target.value) to (v)=>parseFloat(v). data-testid stays 'expenses-farm-amount'.
Fix UnifiedSalesPage split-digital (line 3709) — replace <Input type="number"> with <CalcInput> to match its sibling split-cash at line 3703. onChange signature change (drop e.target).
Optional: After fixes, main agent can self-test by opening each dialog and pressing '+' on the input — if data-calc-active flips to '1' and the {testid}-tape bubble appears, it works.
critical_code_review_comments: Two Phase-1 wiring misses (expenses-farm-amount, split-digital) — easy to miss because onChange signature differs between raw <Input> (e.target.value) and <CalcInput> (v). Recommend a lint/grep check: 'rg "<Input type=\"number\"" frontend/src | wc -l' to ensure Phase-2 sweep doesn't miss any.

CalcInput itself is well-designed: pure JS shunting-yard (no eval — offline-safe), proper keydown preventDefault, tape has role=status aria-live=polite for screen readers, data-calc-active attribute enables robust test hooks. No bugs found in the component.
PaymentsPage receive-amount correctly disables itself until a customer is selected (line 1245 disabled={!selectedCustomer}) — this is expected business logic, not a calc bug.

success_rate.frontend: 2 confirmed wiring misses / ~25 expected CalcInput locations = ~92% Phase-1 completion

context_for_next_testing_agent: Main agent should patch the 2 inputs flagged above. After patch, next testing agent can verify: (1) open Farm Expense dialog, focus amount, type '10+5', Enter → expect '15'; (2) in UnifiedSales Quick mode split payment, test split-digital supports calc the same way split-cash does. Also, the Terminal POS offline mode + FundTransfer/StockInjection flows were NOT exercised live due to multi-step entry paths — those source files do import & use CalcInput correctly but live e2e is still pending.
rca of the issue: Phase 1 wiring was a manual file-by-file replacement of <Input type="number"> with <CalcInput>. The two misses are where the Input was in a less-travelled branch of the file (Farm Expense secondary dialog in ExpensesPage; split-digital sibling in UnifiedSalesPage). Likely human oversight — both adjacent siblings (expenses-expense-amount, split-cash) were correctly migrated, but the mirror input was missed. Mitigation: a single rg sweep 'rg "<Input type=\"number\"" frontend/src/pages frontend/src/components' will reveal any remaining plain numeric inputs; consider converting them all (or whitelisting ones that legitimately shouldn't be calc fields, e.g. quantity-in-units where user never does math).
